_note: Draft stimuli — SLP validation required before clinical use.

items.semanticCue: It is a fruit. It is long and yellow.
items.gesture: Mime peeling a banana, then take a bite.

items.semanticCue: It is a fruit. It is round and red.
items.gesture: Hold an imaginary round fruit in one hand and bite.

items.semanticCue: You drink it when you are thirsty.
items.gesture: Cup your hand and bring it to your mouth.

items.semanticCue: You drink from it. It has a handle.
items.gesture: Pinch a handle with your fingers and lift to your lips.

items.semanticCue: You sit on it. It has four legs.
items.gesture: Lower yourself slightly as if sitting down.

items.semanticCue: You sleep on it at night.
items.gesture: Tilt your head onto folded hands like a pillow.

items.semanticCue: It is an animal. It barks.
items.gesture: Pat your thigh as if calling a pet.

items.semanticCue: A hot drink. Brown in colour.
items.gesture: Hold a small cup and blow gently before sipping.

items.semanticCue: You read it. It has pages.
items.gesture: Open both palms together like an open book.
Touch fingertips above your head to form a roof.
